Package in.co.rays.proj4.model

Class UserModel

java.lang.Object
in.co.rays.proj4.model.UserModel
public class UserModel extends Object
UserModel is a Model class that handles all database operations for the User entity. It is used to perform CRUD operations on the ST_USER table. This class contains methods for adding, updating, deleting, searching, and authenticating users, along with password management and user registration functionality. It interacts with the database using JDBC and communicates with the UserBean for data transfer.
Author:
Harshit Panchal

  • Field Details

    • log

      org.apache.log4j.Logger log
      Logger instance for logging debug, info, warn, error and fatal messages

  • Constructor Details

    • UserModel

      public UserModel()

  • Method Details

    • nextpk

      public Integer nextpk() throws DataBaseException
      Returns the next available primary key for the ST_USER table by fetching the current maximum ID and incrementing it by 1.
      Returns:
      next available primary key as Integer
      Throws:
      DataBaseException - if any database error occurs while fetching the key

    • add

      public long add(UserBean bean) throws DuplicateException, ApplicationException
      Adds a new User record to the ST_USER table. Before inserting, it checks if a user with the same login already exists to prevent duplicates. Rolls back the transaction if any error occurs during insertion.
      Parameters:
      bean - the UserBean containing the user details to be added
      Returns:
      the primary key of the newly added user record
      Throws:
      DuplicateException - if a user with the same login already exists
      ApplicationException - if any error occurs during the add operation

    • update

      public void update(UserBean bean) throws DuplicateException, ApplicationException
      Updates an existing User record in the ST_USER table. Before updating, it checks if another user with the same login already exists to prevent duplicates. Rolls back the transaction if any error occurs during update.
      Parameters:
      bean - the UserBean containing the updated user details
      Throws:
      DuplicateException - if another user with the same login already exists
      ApplicationException - if any error occurs during the update operation

    • delete

      public void delete(UserBean bean) throws ApplicationException
      Deletes an existing User record from the ST_USER table based on the ID present in the provided UserBean.
      Parameters:
      bean - the UserBean containing the ID of the user to be deleted
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if any error occurs during the delete operation

    • findByPk

      public UserBean findByPk(long pk) throws ApplicationException
      Finds and returns a User record from the ST_USER table based on the given primary key.
      Parameters:
      pk - the primary key of the user to be fetched
      Returns:
      UserBean containing the user details, or null if not found
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if any error occurs while fetching the record

    • findByLogin

      public UserBean findByLogin(String login) throws ApplicationException
      Finds and returns a User record from the ST_USER table based on the given login ID.
      Parameters:
      login - the login ID (email/username) of the user to be fetched
      Returns:
      UserBean containing the user details, or null if not found
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if any error occurs while fetching the record

    • authenticate

      public UserBean authenticate(String login, String password) throws ApplicationException
      Authenticates a user by verifying the provided login ID and password against the ST_USER table records.
      Parameters:
      login - the login ID (email/username) of the user
      password - the password of the user
      Returns:
      UserBean containing the authenticated user details, or null if authentication fails
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if any error occurs during authentication

    • changePassword

      public boolean changePassword(Long id, String oldPassword, String newPassword) throws RecordNotFoundException, ApplicationException
      Changes the password of an existing user after validating the old password. On successful password change, sends a confirmation email to the user's registered login ID.
      Parameters:
      id - the unique ID of the user whose password is to be changed
      oldPassword - the current password of the user for validation
      newPassword - the new password to be set for the user
      Returns:
      true if the password was changed successfully, false otherwise
      Throws:
      RecordNotFoundException - if the old password does not match the existing password
      ApplicationException - if any error occurs during the password change operation

    • forgetPassword

      public boolean forgetPassword(String login) throws RecordNotFoundException, ApplicationException
      Sends the existing password to the user's registered login ID (email) in case the user has forgotten their password. Throws an exception if the provided login ID does not exist in the system.
      Parameters:
      login - the login ID (email) of the user who forgot the password
      Returns:
      true if the forget password email was sent successfully
      Throws:
      RecordNotFoundException - if no user is found with the given login ID
      ApplicationException - if any error occurs while sending the email

    • list

      public List list() throws ApplicationException
      Returns a list of all User records from the ST_USER table without any filters or pagination.
      Returns:
      List of UserBean containing all user records
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if any error occurs while fetching the records

    • search

      public List<UserBean> search(UserBean bean, int pageNo, int pageSize) throws ApplicationException
      Searches for User records in the ST_USER table based on the provided search criteria with optional pagination support. If the bean is null, all records are returned. Supports filtering by id, first name, last name, login, password, date of birth, mobile number, role ID, and gender.
      Parameters:
      bean - the UserBean containing the search criteria, or null to fetch all records
      pageNo - the page number for pagination (use 0 for no pagination)
      pageSize - the number of records per page (use 0 for no pagination)
      Returns:
      List of UserBean matching the search criteria
      Throws:
      ApplicationException - if any error occurs during the search operation

    • registerUser

      public long registerUser(UserBean bean) throws DuplicateException, ApplicationException
      Registers a new user by adding their details to the ST_USER table and sends a registration confirmation email to the user's login ID upon successful registration.
      Parameters:
      bean - the UserBean containing the new user's registration details
      Returns:
      the primary key of the newly registered user record
      Throws:
      DuplicateException - if a user with the same login already exists
      ApplicationException - if any error occurs during registration or while sending the confirmation email
